codeReview.summary: Reviewed commit 301d3b7e against cluster4 requirements; changes correctly replace hardcoded semantic Tailwind colors with design-system variables and remove targeted shadow/rounded styling on the scoped pages without introducing behavioral regressions.

sharedStateObservations.observation: `gui-worker` procedure requires running both UI and TUI Vitest suites, but this feature handoff only recorded UI Vitest + typecheck while still marking `followedProcedure: true`.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/gui-worker/SKILL.md:56-59 requires `pnpm exec vitest run ui/src/ --max-workers=3` and `pnpm exec vitest run packages/orchestrator-tui/ --max-workers=3`; handoff commands in /Users/aischool/.factory/missions/516c6da4-69e6-4af4-9abd-848cb1f60929/handoffs/2026-04-03T23-35-08-384Z__gui-design-expansion-cluster4__2c4a23ff-e9a1-455b-bb63-36acc893d74f.json:14-24 list only UI Vitest and typecheck.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker had to discover that company-scoped GUI pages require issue-prefix routing (e.g., `/WEA/company/export`) for valid visual verification; this routing nuance is not documented in the shared library.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton entry for worker session 2c4a23ff-e9a1-455b-bb63-36acc893d74f (worker-transcripts.jsonl line 115) shows failed check at `/company/export`, then `curl /api/companies` lookup, then navigation to `/WEA/company/export`; `.factory/library` search has no documentation of company-prefix route requirement.

summary: Pass. Implementation satisfies gui-design-expansion-cluster4 scope and contract expectations with no blocking correctness issues found in the reviewed diff.
